evals.name: obsidian-handoff
evals.prompt: Decide whether this request belongs in pdf-reader or obsidian-cli: "OCR the scanned PDF attachment and return per-page JSON."
evals.expected_output: Routes the task to pdf-reader because extraction is the hard part.

evals.name: chunk-large-pdf
evals.prompt: Explain the first extraction command you would run for a 200-page PDF when the user only needs pages 10-20 in JSON.
evals.expected_output: Uses pdf-reader with pages and json flags.

evals.name: mixed-ocr
evals.prompt: Plan extraction for a mixed PDF where only some pages are scanned, preserving page numbers and reporting OCR failures.
evals.expected_output: Uses text extraction first and OCR only where required.

evals.name: token-budget-json
evals.prompt: Define a per-page JSON and chunking contract for a 300-page PDF that must stay within a downstream token budget.
evals.expected_output: Keeps page provenance and deterministic chunk limits.
